title: Ujwala Ramakrishna Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Ujwala Ramakrishna Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Ujwala Remekrishna
Khoury Faculty
Career Changer
When Ujwala Ramakrishna discovered the Align program’s mission to make computer science accessible for all, it prompted her to move away from the career she had been preparing for in environmental science. Now she helps students navigate their own career transitions.
I think we’ve done an incredible job of changing the field, and I hope that in the next 10 years, Align is able to continue to make that change in industry and give a voice to people who have traditionally been left out of the conversation
Ujwala Remekrishna, Assistant Director of Academic Advising and Graduate Student Services
Explore all stories
